chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1399 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 18.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Basit Langah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate for respondent No.5 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General along with Zafar Iqbal, Regional Director, Local Government Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- AAG files compliance report on behalf of Regional Director Local Government Sukkur, which is taken on record. The counsel for petitioner submits that grievance of petitioner has been resolved. Therefore instant petition is disposed of as infructuous. The order dated 09.09.2025, passed by this Court is hereby re-called. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
